commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves caller-provided OpenAI-compatible memory embedding provider IDs through the OpenAI adapter/resolver and adds regression tests for custom and default lookup paths.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +70. Total +86 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main resolves custom OpenAI-compatible memory provider ids to the OpenAI adapter, then hard-codes openai at both remote-client lookup sites. The PR body also includes pre/post terminal proof from a local HTTP listener showing the routing difference.
